criteria.description: The launch surface shows the April 13, 8:00 PM notice, hides the Agent handoff section, and keeps the remaining visible sections in a valid order.
criteria.notes: Integration coverage verifies the updated hero actions, the hidden agent prompt section, and the visible section ordering.

criteria.description: Journey start is gated by SBTI input and the simulation extends through Task 6 with a stable LBTI finale.
criteria.notes: Integration checks validate the SBTI gate before start, and unit coverage validates the six-task order plus the stable Task 6 completion badge.

criteria.description: The implementation remains buildable and all automated validation stays green after the 006 polish set.
criteria.evidence: npm run test && npm run build
criteria.notes: The final validation run passed 28 tests across 4 files, and the Vite production bundle built successfully.

criteria.description: All four work packages are recorded in the done lane for the 006 mission before acceptance.
criteria.notes: WP01 through WP04 are all materialized in the done lane after the direct-repo override flow.
